## OBJECTIVES
- IMMEDIATE OBJECTIVE: Build the unified knowledge object library from HTML + PDF sources and imported global stores.
- OVERALL OBJECTIVE (section S01): Turn the static knowledge repository into an active decision-making system with mandatory retrieval, source citation, decision traces, memorialization, and a knowledge graph.

## INPUTS YOU MAY READ
- config/knowledge_sources.json
- engine/kb_build.py

## THE ONE ACTION
Run engine/kb_build.py to ingest HTML/PDF/md/txt/json + images and merge existing global stores into knowledge_object_library/; capture the real MANIFEST output.

## COMMAND(S) TO RUN
```bash
python3 engine/kb_build.py
```
